languages.text: {n}Вместо ответа Эоганн выжидающе смотрит на сервочереп. Нунциус флегматично парит на уровне его плеча, являя собой образец лаконичности.{/n}
{n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder, the very embodiment of brevity.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вместо ответа Эоганн выжидающе смотрит на сервочереп. Нунциус флегматично парит на уровне его плеча, являя собой образец лаконичности.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder as the very embodiment of conciseness.{/n}
{n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder as the very embodiment of conciseness.{/n}
{n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder, the very embodiment of brevity.{/n}
{n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder, the very embodiment of brevity.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En vez de responder, Eogunn mira expectante al servocráneo. Nuncius flota impasible junto a su hombro, el vivo retrato de la brevedad.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder, the very embodiment of brevity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En vez de responder, Eogunn mira expectante al servocráneo. Nuncius flota impasible junto a su hombro, el vivo retrato de la brevedad.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡没有回应，而是满怀期待地看向那伺服头骨。努恩修斯面无表情地悬浮在他的肩侧，堪称惜字如金的代名词。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder, the very embodiment of brevity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡没有回应，而是满怀期待地看向那伺服头骨。努恩修斯面无表情地悬浮在他的肩侧，堪称惜字如金的代名词。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Anstatt zu antworten, richtet Eogunn seinen Blick erwartungsvoll auf den Servoschädel. Nuncius schwebt teilnahmslos und wortkarg wie immer über seiner Schulter.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder, the very embodiment of brevity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Anstatt zu antworten, richtet Eogunn seinen Blick erwartungsvoll auf den Servoschädel. Nuncius schwebt teilnahmslos und wortkarg wie immer über seiner Schulter.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Au lieu de répondre, Eogunn adresse un regard interrogateur au servocrâne. Nuncius lévite impassiblement près de son épaule, incarnation parfaite de la concision.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder, the very embodiment of brevity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Au lieu de répondre, Eogunn adresse un regard interrogateur au servocrâne. Nuncius lévite impassiblement près de son épaule, incarnation parfaite de la concision.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, cevap vermek yerine beklenti içinde hizmelete bakıyor. Nuncius, az ve öz olmanın vücut bulmuş hâli olarak omzunun hizasında tepkisizce süzülüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of responding, Eogunn looks expectantly at the servo-skull. Nuncius hovers impassively at his shoulder, the very embodiment of brevity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, cevap vermek yerine beklenti içinde hizmelete bakıyor. Nuncius, az ve öz olmanın vücut bulmuş hâli olarak omzunun hizasında tepkisizce süzülüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンは返答するのではなく、期待を込めてサーボスカルを見つめている。ヌンシウスは肩に無表情に浮かび、簡潔さの化身である。{/n}
